_comment: Hand-built ground truth for score_extraction. `section` is the mark-band the importer derives from marks (1=A,2=B,3=C,4=E,5=D) — NOT the printed Biology/Chemistry/Physics section — so it matches the extractor's output. `qtype` follows the extraction contract: a top-level OR question is one `internal_choice` (Q11,16,27,29,34,39); a sub-part-only OR keeps its band (Q15 is a 4-mark case-based question). `key` is a verbatim phrase from the English question text; the scorer matches it against the question's full text (stem + options + subparts + choices + assertion/reason), so a key may be drawn from any region — for thin-stem types (assertion-reason, differences, internal-choice) the key is taken from the assertion/subpart wording.
